description.p: This magical warhammer is a weapon of menmonite craft, radiating a faint electrical glow. It grants a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon.

As a bonus action, you can activate the mechanism that electrifies the spines covering this maul. When activated, the weapon deals an additional 2d6 lightning damage on each successful melee attack until the end of your turn.

As an action, you can strike the ground with all your might, causing the earth to tremble around you. Each creature in a 15-foot-radius circle centered on the impact point must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Strength modifier). On a failed save, a creature is knocked prone. Additionally, if the ground is earth or stone, the impact zone becomes difficult terrain until it settles. This weapon has 3 charges and regains 1d4 - 1 charges when you finish a long rest.
This magical cannon is a martial ranged weapon, expertly crafted with menmonite metallurgy. It grants a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon.

Damage. When you hit with an attack using this cannon, the target takes 4d10 bludgeoning damage, plus your Dexterity modifier (minimum 1). If firing special ammunition, the damage and effects are replaced by those of the ammunition.

You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. It has the thrown property with a normal range of 20 feet and a long range of 60 feet. When you hit with a ranged attack using this weapon, it deals an extra 1d8 damage or, if the target is a giant, 2d8 damage. Immediately after the attack, the weapon flies back to your hand.
